shaped.title: Reverend Insanity
shaped.author: Gu Zhen Ren
shaped.note: 1200+ chapters and Fang Yuan never once breaks character to be likeable. A protagonist who treats ethics as other people's cope and survival as the only axiom. The most honest thing I've read about actually wanting power — and a world so internally consistent it stops reading like fiction.

recent.title: $100M Offers
recent.author: Alex Hormozi
recent.note: Last business book that genuinely stuck. Value equation over hustle — make the offer so good that declining feels stupid. Honestly not reading much else lately; this earned the slot.
